items.description:

It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . items.name: Marble Butterfly Shoulder Companion [PBR]
items.description:
🦋 “Not just an accessory — it’s a living piece of art.” ✨
Perched upon your shoulder, this marble-winged butterfly isn’t ordinary. Its cracked crystal-like wings glisten with soft light, while golden chains sway gently with every step you take. Wearing it feels less like fashion and more like carrying a fragment of a magical tale on your shoulder. Perfect for avatars who want to be remembered, not just noticed.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
One-of-a-kind marble wings that shimmer like enchanted stone
Golden chain ornaments that dance with your movement
A shoulder companion that turns heads in fantasy and fashion worlds
Crafted with PBR textures for striking realism and artistic flair
🔍 Keywords: butterfly, marble, magical, shoulder, fantasy, enchanted, elegant, stylish, wings, unique
✨ Don’t just accessorize — make your avatar a legend.
